Privacy Policy More Menu Contact Chris Elmore MP MP for Bridgend & Porthcawl Address 33 Caroline Street, Bridgend CF31 1DW, UK View on Google Maps Telephone 01656 860034 Email [email protected] You can find the contact details for your local Member of the Senedd or Local Councillor by clicking the links below. My office is open Monday to Friday, 9am–5pm, and you can reach us on 01656 860034 or by email at [email protected] . Alternatively, you can fill out the contact form below and a member of my team will get back to you as soon as possible.
